title: Theme Switch
description: Consume a theme context and use it to dynamically change the background color of a View.
problemStatement:
Apply the theme! In a component, use the `useContext` hook to access a `ThemeContext`. Use the returned `themeColor` to set the `backgroundColor` of a container `View`.

**Requirement:** Access the context using `useContext(ThemeContext)`.
hints: Using Context for themes allows you to change the look of the whole app from one central place.
expectedOutput: A View component whose color changes based on the context value
